channel.title: DTO
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from DTO, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Chipotle CEO to customers: Don’t come to us for dollar menus
Dow retreating in final hour, S&P 500 and Nasdaq flat after jobs report — live
Watch Pam Bondi hearing: AG touts record Dow as Democrats grill her over Trump, Epstein
item.description: Bondi's sworn testimony came after Rep. Jerrold Nadler, D-N.Y., slammed the DOJ for so far failing to indict any Jeffrey Epstein co-conspirators.

item.title: Dow snaps 3-session run of gains, U.S. stocks end lower after January jobs data
The latest jobs report is bad news — except for these fields
Tariff bills across U.S. states mount as affordability and Trump head for midterm elections showdown
item.description: New data shows that states where key midterm elections races will take place paid over $134 billion in tariffs during 2025 as affordability issues mou...

item.title: GOP defectors help spike House measure to block tariff disapproval votes
item.description: The House on Tuesday voted against language that would have blocked challenges to Trump's tariffs through the summer.

item.title: Epstein files: Yale bars David Gelernter from teaching classes amid review of emails
item.description: Former Harvard University President Larry Summers last fall stopped teaching classes there after fallout from his dealings with Jeffrey Epstein.

item.title: The K-shaped economy has turned against the middle class, B. of A. data indicate
SAVE Act: House to vote on Trump-backed voter ID bill
item.description: The SAVE America Act's GOP supporters say it would secure elections and prevent fraud. Democrats say it could disenfranchise millions.
